primary.usage: Display, Hero, H1, H2, H3, Massive Editorial Quotes
primary.weights: Variable (from Light to Extrabold for kinetic scroll animations)

secondary.usage: Body, Captions, UI Elements, Data Tables, Forms

kinetic_scroll_effect.description: Progressive font weight increase on scroll (Light -> Extrabold)
kinetic_scroll_effect.implementation: Animate 'font-variation-settings: "wght" [value]' using GSAP ScrollTrigger with scrub. Do NOT animate standard 'font-weight' property to maintain 60fps and GPU composite.
kinetic_scroll_effect.best_practice: Split text into words using splitType or SplitText, then iterate over words to stagger the font variation wght axis based on scroll progress.

rules: NO GRADIENTS. Stick purely to solid monochrome values.
Use #A6A6A6 for body text on dark mode to prevent eye strain.
Use #2A2A2A for 1px structural borders and dividers.
Never use pure transparent backgrounds for overlays. Use solid #000000 or backdrop-blur with a dark/light tint.

spacing_and_grids.whitespace_philosophy: Apple-level generous whitespace. Empty space is structural.

grid_system.asymmetric_rule: Avoid perfect symmetry. E.g., Left col-span-4 for heading, right col-span-7 (with 1 col offset) for massive typography quote or image.
grid_system.alignment: Strictly left-aligned text for body. Headings can span entire grid.

layouts.hero: Cinematic WebGL canvas covering 100vw/100vh. Minimal overlaying text. Floating 3D abstract object responding to mouse.
layouts.ecosystem_cards: Alternating bento grid (col-span-8 and col-span-4 combinations). Each card has a 1px #2A2A2A border, pure black background, hovering spotlight effect.
layouts.timeline: Vertical strict structural line. Years massive on the left, descriptive text on the right.
layouts.manifesto: Massive typography (10vw) spanning full width. Progressive bold kinetic effect on scroll.
layouts.navigation: Minimal top bar. Hidden mega-menu or overlay menu. No hamburger on desktop, show links.
layouts.admin_dashboard: High-density functional grid. #0A0A0A background, #2A2A2A borders. Tabular data strictly left-aligned.

buttons.style: Pill-shaped or sharp rectangular variants. 1px border. Monochrome inverted on hover.
buttons.motion: Magnetic effect on hover (Framer Motion / GSAP). Custom cursor snapping.

cards.style: Flat solid pure black or #0A0A0A backgrounds with #2A2A2A borders.
cards.motion: 3D tilt on hover (using react-parallax-tilt or framer-motion), internal mouse spotlight gradient (radial-gradient of rgba(255,255,255,0.1)).

forms.style: Editorial line inputs. No bounding boxes. border-b border-[#2A2A2A] bg-transparent text-white focus:border-white transition-colors. Padding only on bottom.

visual_enhancers.film_grain: Fixed full-screen div with pointer-events-none and a repeating SVG noise pattern, opacity 0.03 - 0.05. Gives a tactile cinematic feel.
visual_enhancers.custom_cursor: Small white dot (mix-blend-mode: difference). Expands on hover over links/buttons or images.
visual_enhancers.mask_reveals: Images and massive text should reveal using CSS clip-path or overflow-hidden wrappers on scroll.

motion.scroll: MANDATORY: Lenis smooth scroll for momentum and weight.
motion.page_transitions: Black screen wipe or fade-up sequence.
motion.split_text: Use SplitType for headings. Staggered reveal of characters/words with cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) ease.
motion.stagger_animations: List items (Ecosystem, Careers) must animate in with a 50-100ms stagger on scroll entry.

hero_webgl.implementation: Render a dark, glossy, morphing abstract geometric shape or particles. Must use <Environment preset="city" /> with low intensity and directional lighting to highlight edges. Background must be transparent to blend with #000000.

hero_and_abstract.description: Abstract monochrome wavy lines (good for hero fallback or deep tech background)
Stunning 3D abstract geometric shapes in monochrome

robotics_and_ai.description: Futuristic metallic robot arm in black and white

semiconductors_and_tech.description: Close-up of an electronic component (Pulse H1102NL) macro monochrome
Micro processor chip in pure black and white

industrial_and_logistics.description: Macro shot of industrial mechanical engine parts in grayscale

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over pure black meets APCA standards. Use #FFFFFF for primary text, #A6A6A6 for secondary text.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Wrap kinetic typography and WebGL initializations in prefers-reduced-motion checks. Provide static fallbacks.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, and form inputs MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid="hero-cta-button").

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a production-ready website using React (.jsx / .js files), Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion / GSAP.
DO NOT use .tsx. The stack is Javascript.
Install and setup @studio-freight/react-lenis for smooth scrolling.
Install gsap and @gsap/react for scroll storytelling and kinetic text weight animations.
Install @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei for the 3D WebGL hero background.
Install lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react for minimalist line icons.
Do NOT use pre-built generic templates. Every section must be manually crafted using raw HTML tags for layout to allow precise GSAP control.
For the Admin Dashboard, use shadcn/ui components but strip away their default look to match the flat, pure monochrome, 1px border aesthetic.
Use CSS Grid heavily. Rely on gap-8 to gap-32. Do not cram elements.
Implement a global noise overlay (pointer-events: none) across the entire application for cinematic film grain.
For progressive bold text on scroll, bind GSAP ScrollTrigger to 'font-variation-settings': '"wght"' in inline styles to interpolate weight.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and subtle #2A2A2A borders.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). It breaks GSAP and Framer Motion transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. No '.App { text-align: center; }'. Keep natural reading flow.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with magnetic interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (like robot/brain emojis) for icons. Use clean SVG icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, custom cursors, parallax effects. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN. Always use the provided image URLs.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
